Iâm trying to pull together a show at the oak on Saturday the 1st of Feb.

A pretty famous pro skater Dustin dollin is going to stay at the oak for a few days, doing a pop up photo exhibition and his band is playing with a pretty big femm solo artist from nyc.

I sent in a few of my fav newy bands to put on the lineup and you were at the top of that list.

He loves your stuff and would love you to be on the lineup.

Itâs pretty loose on detail at the moment, but it would be between 7-11pm.
